ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beers" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the beer */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the beer (e.g., IPA, Stout) */,
  "brewery" INTEGER /* Reference to the brewery where the beer is produced */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume percentage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beer */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Detailed description of the flavor profile */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the beer (e.g., seasonal, year-round) */,
  "ibu" INTEGER /* International Bitterness Units */,
  "serving_temperature" TEXT /* Recommended serving temperature */,
  "pairing_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for food pairings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beers_brewery FOREIGN KEY ("brewery") REFERENCES brewery_details ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., overall, taste, appearance) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the rating */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer being rated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., overall, taste, appearance) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer being reviewed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the beer category (e.g., IPA, Stout) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beer category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beer_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES beer_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the beer style */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer category this style belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the beer style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beer_styles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES beer_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brewery_details" (
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewery */,
  "brewery_name" TEXT /* Name of the brewery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the brewery */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brewery */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brewery was founded */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information (phone and email) */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action the user performed (e.g., view, submit rating) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
